title: sticherus cryptocarpus
intro: Sticherus cryptocarpus, also known as the Cryptocarpus Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Caledonia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sticherus cryptocarpus include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or topical application.
